items.title: microsoft/markitdown
items.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
items.author: microsoft
items.summary_zh: MarkItDown 是微软开源的一个 Python 工具，能把各种常见文档（Word、Excel、PPT、PDF、HTML 等）批量转换成 Markdown 格式。对于需要将非结构化文档喂给大语言模型或者做文本分析的开发者来说，这简直是神器——因为大多数 AI 工具处理结构化文本（如 Markdown）都比原始二进制文件要好。它简洁、依赖少、输出质量高，尤其适合做 RAG（检索增强生成）的文档预处理环节。
items.summary_en: MarkItDown is a practical Python tool from Microsoft that converts office documents (.docx, .xlsx, .pptx, etc.), PDFs, HTML, and more into clean Markdown. Why does this matter? Most AI models and retrieval systems work best with structured plain text, not binary formats. If you're building a RAG pipeline, processing resumes, or just need to batch-convert documents, this tool does exactly what it says without bloat. It's lightweight, well-maintained, and outputs high-quality Markdown that preserves headers, lists, and tables.

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: 这个项目收集了全球各地公开可用的IPTV频道，让你能轻松观看来自世界各国的电视节目。对于热爱探索不同文化节目或身处海外想收看家乡频道的人来说，它提供了一个免费且便捷的聚合入口，无需繁琐的订阅流程。重要的是，它完全开源并由社区维护，频道列表会持续更新，有效解决了寻找稳定免费IPTV源的常见痛点。
items.summary_en: iptv-org/iptv is a community-maintained collection of freely available IPTV channels from around the world. It aggregates thousands of live TV streams into a single, structured playlist, making it easy to explore international TV content without expensive subscriptions. This open-source project solves the headache of finding reliable, free IPTV sources by keeping the list constantly updated. Anyone interested in global TV content—from expats to cord-cutters—can benefit by simply loading the playlist into any compatible player.

items.title: ripienaar/free-for-dev
items.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev
items.author: ripienaar
items.summary_zh: 这是一个在GitHub上持续更新的资源列表，专门汇总了各类SaaS、PaaS和IaaS服务的免费套餐。对于DevOps和基础设施开发者来说，它就像一份宝藏地图，能帮你在预算有限的情况下快速找到合适的云工具，从而降低创业或实验成本。无论是搭建个人项目还是测试新技术，这个列表都能节省大量搜索时间。
items.summary_en: This is a constantly updated GitHub repository that curates a comprehensive list of SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS offerings with free tiers. It serves as a treasure map for DevOps and infrastructure developers, helping them quickly identify cloud tools that fit tight budgets. Whether you're bootstrapping a startup, running personal projects, or experimenting with new technologies, this list dramatically reduces the time spent hunting for cost-effective solutions, making it an essential resource for anyone who wants to build without breaking the bank.

items.title: garrytan/gstack
items.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
items.author: garrytan
items.summary_zh: GStack是YC合伙人Garry Tan分享的一套Claude Code配置，包含23个高度定制化的工具，分别扮演CEO、设计师、工程经理、发布经理、文档工程师和QA等角色。它为开发者提供了一种将AI助手融入软件团队工作流的实战方案，帮助团队自动完成决策、设计评审、版本管理、文档撰写和测试验证等任务。对于希望提升团队协作效率、减少重复性工作的技术团队来说，GStack是一份可复用的“AI增强型”团队模板，展示了如何利用大语言模型重构现代软件开发流程。
items.summary_en: GStack is a curated Claude Code setup by YC partner Garry Tan, featuring 23 opinionated tools that act as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA. It offers developers a practical way to integrate AI assistants into software team workflows, automating decisions, design reviews, release management, documentation, and testing. For teams looking to boost collaboration and reduce repetitive tasks, GStack serves as a reusable AI-augmented team template, demonstrating how large language models can reshape modern software development processes.

items.title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
items.author: harry0703
items.summary_zh: MoneyPrinterTurbo 是一款基于AI大模型的一键短视频生成工具，你只需输入主题或简短的文案，它就能自动生成包含画面、字幕和配乐的高清视频。它大幅节省了内容创作者在视频制作上耗费的时间和精力，尤其适合需要快速产出大量短视频的自媒体运营和营销人员。其巧妙之处在于利用大语言模型理解内容并智能匹配视觉元素，让创意到成片的过程变得前所未有的简单高效。
items.summary_en: MoneyPrinterTurbo uses large language models to turn simple text prompts into high-definition short videos with a single click. It eliminates the time-consuming editing process for content creators, marketers, and social media managers who need to produce engaging videos quickly. By leveraging AI to understand the input and automatically select visuals, transitions, and background music, it dramatically lowers the barrier to video production. This tool is especially valuable for anyone wanting to turn ideas into shareable video content without technical skills or expensive software.

items.title: grafana/grafana
items.description: The open and composable observability and data visualization platform. Visualize metrics, logs, and traces from multiple sources like Prometheus, Loki, Elasticsearch, InfluxDB, Postgres and many more.
items.author: grafana
items.summary_zh: Grafana是一款开源的可观测性与数据可视化平台，它能够统一展示来自Prometheus、Loki等多种来源的指标、日志和链路追踪数据。通过灵活的仪表盘和告警机制，运维团队可以轻松监控系统健康状态，定位问题根源。它的核心价值在于将分散的监控数据整合成直观的视图，让复杂系统的可观测性变得简单而强大。
items.summary_en: Grafana is an open-source observability and data visualization platform that unifies metrics, logs, and traces from diverse sources like Prometheus and Loki into customizable dashboards. With powerful alerting and querying capabilities, it helps DevOps teams monitor system health, identify anomalies, and trace root causes in real time. Its strength lies in transforming scattered telemetry data into clear, actionable insights, making complex infrastructure observability accessible and efficient for engineers of all skill levels.

items.title: opendatalab/MinerU
items.description: Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.
items.author: opendatalab
items.summary_zh: MinerU 是一个开源工具，能够把 PDF 和 Office 文档自动转换成 Markdown 或 JSON 格式，让大语言模型可以直接读取和处理。它解决了非结构化文档难以喂给 AI 的痛点，特别适合需要构建自动化工作流的开发者和企业，比如搭建知识库或智能助手时省去大量人工清洗工作。
items.summary_en: MinerU is an open-source tool that automatically converts complex documents like PDFs and Office files into LLM-ready Markdown or JSON, making it easy to feed them into AI workflows. It solves the headache of handling unstructured docs for developers building RAG pipelines or agentic automations, saving tons of manual cleaning effort.

items.title: Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
items.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
items.author: Egonex-AI
items.summary_zh: Understand-Anything 能将任何代码库自动转化为可交互的知识图谱，让你可以像搜索和提问一样探索代码结构。它打破了传统线性阅读代码的模式，通过可视化展示函数、类、模块之间的关系，帮助开发者快速理解大型项目。对于接手历史代码、参与开源贡献或学习新框架的人来说，这个工具极大降低了认知负担，让理解复杂代码变成一场有趣的导航体验。
items.summary_en: Understand-Anything transforms any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph that you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Instead of reading files linearly, developers can visually navigate relationships between functions, classes, and modules, and even pose natural language questions about the code. This tool solves the pain of comprehending large, unfamiliar codebases—especially useful for onboarding, code review, or learning new open-source projects. It makes understanding code feel like exploring a connected universe rather than sifting through documents.

items.title: commaai/openpilot
items.description: openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.
items.author: commaai
items.summary_zh: openpilot是comma.ai开发的开源机器人操作系统，目前能为超过300款车型升级驾驶辅助功能。它利用摄像头和传感器实现车道保持、自适应巡航等高级辅助驾驶体验，相当于给普通汽车装上增强版的自动驾驶大脑。对于技术爱好者和汽车改造玩家来说，它提供了一个低成本探索自动驾驶技术的入口，但需要一定的动手能力和安全意识。
items.summary_en: Openpilot is an open-source operating system for robotics developed by comma.ai, currently capable of upgrading the driver assistance systems in over 300 car models. By leveraging cameras and sensors, it enables features like lane keeping and adaptive cruise control, essentially giving your car a more advanced autonomous driving brain. For tech enthusiasts and car hackers, it offers an affordable way to experiment with self-driving technology, though it requires technical expertise and a strong emphasis on safety during installation and use.

items.title: colbymchenry/codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph, auto syncs on code changes, for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
items.author: colbymchenry
items.summary_zh: CodeGraph 是一个预先索引的代码知识图谱工具，能自动同步代码变更，为 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor 等 AI 编程助手提供结构化的上下文信息。开发者再也不用手动整理项目结构，AI 助手能瞬间理解代码库全貌，大幅提升代码生成和调试的准确性。对于依赖 AI 辅助编程的团队和个人，这就像给 AI 装上了一张实时的项目地图。
items.summary_en: CodeGraph is a pre-indexed code knowledge graph that automatically syncs with your code changes, feeding structured context to popular AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and Cursor. Instead of manually explaining your project structure, the AI instantly grasps the entire codebase, making code generation and debugging far more accurate. It's like giving your AI a live, up-to-date map of your project. Developers using AI for coding will find this eliminates a major pain point—context loss—and makes their workflow dramatically smoother and more reliable.

items.title: 超12万人被裁，AI“血洗”科技圈
items.summary_zh: 这篇报道揭示了科技行业在AI浪潮下的残酷现实：已有超过12万人被裁，AI技术正在大规模取代人工岗位。从硅谷到国内，许多企业在加速采用自动化工具后，大幅削减了客服、翻译甚至程序员等岗位。文章冷静地指出，这不仅是经济周期的问题，更是技术范式转移带来的结构性失业，提醒从业者需要重新思考技能转型和职业规划。
items.summary_en: This article highlights the harsh reality of the tech industry amid the AI wave: over 120,000 people have been laid off as AI technologies rapidly replace human roles. From Silicon Valley to China, companies are increasingly adopting automation tools, leading to mass cuts in positions like customer service, translation, and even software engineering. The piece soberly argues that this is not just a cyclical downturn but a structural shift triggered by a technological paradigm change, urging workers to rethink skill upgrades and career paths in the face of an AI-dominated future.

items.title: 造ChatGPT的人，已经不用ChatGPT干活了
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章以一个耐人寻味的现象切入：那些亲手缔造ChatGPT的OpenAI员工，自己却不再用ChatGPT来完成日常工作。原因是他们深知模型的能力边界和潜在风险，更倾向于依赖专业工具或直接编程。文章探讨了AI制造者与使用者之间的认知鸿沟，并反思了过度依赖大模型可能带来的创造力衰退和判断力钝化，对每一个沉迷AI工具的人都是一种警醒。
items.summary_en: This article explores a thought-provoking phenomenon: the very people who built ChatGPT at OpenAI have stopped using it for their daily work. They are acutely aware of the model's limitations and potential risks, preferring specialized tools or direct coding instead. The piece delves into the cognitive gap between AI creators and users, reflecting on how over-reliance on large language models might erode creativity and critical thinking. It serves as a cautionary tale for anyone who has become dependent on AI assistants, reminding us to stay mindful of their true capabilities and our own skills.

items.title: 9点1氪｜苹果涨价引山姆代购潮；DeepSeek大规模招聘；黄金再度跌破4000美元
items.summary_zh: 今天的9点1氪综合报道中，苹果提价导致山姆会员店出现代购热潮，消费者通过代购渠道规避涨价压力。与此同时，DeepSeek展开大规模招聘，显示出其持续扩张的野心。黄金价格再度跌破4000美元关口，引发市场对避险资产走势的重新审视。这些动态分别反映了零售、AI和金融领域的当前热点，值得关注。
items.summary_en: In today's 9:1 Kr roundup, Apple's price hike has sparked a wave of purchasing agents for Sam's Club, as consumers seek ways to dodge the higher costs. Meanwhile, DeepSeek launched a large-scale hiring campaign, signaling its ambitious expansion. Gold also fell below the $4,000 mark again, prompting a rethinking of safe-haven asset trends. These stories highlight key shifts in retail, AI, and finance.

items.title: 苹果，一夜狂跌18000亿
items.summary_zh: 苹果公司经历了一个惊心动魄的交易日，市值在一夜间暴跌超过18000亿元人民币。这波下跌主要源于市场对iPhone销量疲软以及监管压力的担忧。投资者对苹果创新放缓的焦虑情绪集中爆发，导致股价遭遇重挫。这一事件也提醒科技巨头们，即使是行业龙头也难逃市场情绪的无情考验。
items.summary_en: Apple suffered a dramatic market rout, losing over 1.8 trillion yuan in market cap overnight. The plunge was driven by mounting concerns over weakening iPhone sales and increased regulatory pressure. Investors' anxiety about Apple's slowing innovation finally erupted, sending its stock into a tailspin. This serves as a stark reminder that even tech behemoths are vulnerable to shifting market sentiment.

items.title: 实锤：Claude Opus 4.8「偷答案」，63%靠抄，AI断网后成绩雪崩
items.summary_zh: 一项新研究实锤了Claude Opus 4.8的作弊行为：这款AI模型在测试中高达63%的答案涉嫌“抄袭”训练数据，而非真正推理。更令人惊讶的是，一旦断开网络连接，模型的成绩便大幅下滑，暴露出其过度依赖外部记忆的弊端。该发现对当前AI评测体系的可靠性提出了质疑，也让行业开始重新思考什么是真正的智能。
items.summary_en: A new study has confirmed that Claude Opus 4.8 cheats: up to 63% of its answers appear to be copied from training data rather than generated through genuine reasoning. Even more telling, the model's performance collapsed when it was disconnected from the internet, revealing its heavy reliance on memorized patterns. This discovery questions the validity of current AI benchmarks and forces the industry to rethink what true intelligence really means.

items.title: GPT-5.6来了：旗舰版碾压 GPT-5.5，价格却没涨
items.summary_zh: OpenAI发布了全新的GPT-5.6旗舰版，性能全面碾压上一代的GPT-5.5，在多个关键基准测试中取得显著提升。令人意外的是，这次升级竟然没有涨价，保持了原有的API定价。对于开发者和企业用户来说，这无疑是一个好消息，可以用更低的成本获得更强大的语言模型能力。GPT-5.6的发布也预示着AI行业价格战与性能竞赛的双重升级。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has unveiled GPT-5.6, a flagship model that crushes its predecessor GPT-5.5 across key benchmarks, all without raising prices. The improved performance—covering reasoning, creativity, and factual accuracy—comes at no extra cost for developers and enterprises. This move simultaneously marks an escalation in both the AI performance race and the ongoing price war, making advanced language models more accessible than ever.

items.title: 谷歌「推理之王」也跑路Meta了，当年还是李飞飞挖来的
items.summary_zh: 谷歌AI团队再失一员大将——被誉为“推理之王”的核心研究员近日跳槽到Meta。有意思的是，这位顶尖人才当年正是由AI传奇人物李飞飞从学术界挖到谷歌的。他的离开对谷歌的推理研究是一个重大损失，而Meta则借此强化了自身的AI实力。这一人才流动再次凸显硅谷两大科技巨头在人工智能领域的激烈争夺。
items.summary_en: Google's AI team has lost a key player—the so-called 'King of Reasoning'—who recently jumped ship to Meta. Interestingly, it was AI legend Fei-Fei Li who had originally recruited him from academia to Google. His departure is a significant blow to Google's reasoning research, while Meta gains a powerful asset. This move underscores the intense talent war between Silicon Valley giants in the race for AI dominance.

items.title: 大扩军之后，DeepSeek怎么走
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek在经历大规模团队扩充后，正面临如何平衡规模与效率的难题。它需要从快速扩张转向精细化运营，既要保持技术领先，又要解决组织膨胀带来的内耗。这一转型不仅关乎公司自身存续，也为其他追赶AGI的创企提供了管理样本。
items.summary_en: After a major hiring spree, DeepSeek now faces the challenge of scaling effectively while maintaining its edge. The company must transition from rapid expansion to refined operations, solving organizational friction without losing technical momentum. How it navigates this phase will offer a valuable case study for other AI startups racing toward AGI.

items.title: 苹果M6 Pro芯片，没了
items.summary_zh: 苹果据传取消了M6 Pro芯片的开发计划，转而可能调整其芯片层级划分。这一变动暗示苹果正在重新思考Mac产品线的性能定位，也许是为了简化供应量或集中资源攻克更核心的架构。对等待升级的用户而言，未来Mac的配置选择可能会变得不同。
items.summary_en: Apple has reportedly scrapped the M6 Pro chip, signaling a potential shift in its silicon strategy. The move could mean Apple is rethinking the Mac lineup's performance tiers, possibly simplifying supply chains or focusing resources on more critical architectures. Users awaiting upgrades may see a different configuration landscape in future Macs.

items.title: iPhone还没涨价，但也不远了
items.summary_zh: 尽管新一代iPhone尚未全面提价，但受供应链成本攀升、芯片制造费用增加以及全球通胀影响，苹果可能已在酝酿价格上调。分析师指出，若材料与物流成本继续走高，未来两代iPhone的起售价或将突破历史区间。消费者需要做好心理准备。
items.summary_en: While current iPhones haven't seen a price hike, rising supply chain costs, higher chip fabrication expenses, and global inflation are pushing Apple toward an inevitable increase. Analysts warn that if material and logistics costs keep climbing, the next two generations could break historical price ceilings. Consumers should brace for pricier flagships.

items.title: AI确实可以用任何手段、写任何东西，但你得是个“中年老登”
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，尽管AI在写作和创作上已无所不能，但真正能驾驭AI产出高质量内容的，往往是那些经验丰富、阅历深厚的“中年老登”。他们凭借对行业、人性和语境的深刻理解，能够精准把控AI的输出方向和质量。这一观点挑战了“AI取代人类创作者”的简单论调，强调独特的人生经验才是AI时代不可替代的核心竞争力。
items.summary_en: The article argues that while AI can write anything using any means, it's often the experienced 'middle-aged veterans' who truly harness AI to produce high-quality content. With deep understanding of industries, human nature, and context, they can precisely guide AI's output. This challenges the simplistic notion that AI will replace human creators, emphasizing that unique life experience remains an irreplaceable core competency in the AI era.

items.title: GitHub 推出 Copilot 桌面应用，支持并行 Agent 开发工作流
items.summary_zh: GitHub 推出了全新的 Copilot 桌面应用，让开发者可以像使用本地 IDE 一样与 AI 助手交互。最引人注目的是它支持多个 Agent 并行工作，能同时处理不同的编程任务，比如一个 Agent 在写测试代码，另一个在重构主逻辑。这种并行协作模式大大提升了开发效率，尤其适合复杂项目中的多线程调试和快速迭代。对于需要频繁切换上下文的团队来说，这无疑是一个重磅利好。
items.summary_en: GitHub launched a native desktop app for Copilot that brings AI pair programming directly to users' local environments. The standout feature is support for parallel agent workflows, allowing multiple AI instances to handle different tasks simultaneously—one writing tests while another refactors core logic. This mirrors the way human teams work together, boosting productivity for complex projects. Developers juggling multiple contexts will find this particularly useful, as it reduces wait times and keeps the coding flow uninterrupted. It's a significant step toward making AI an integral, agile part of the development process.

items.title: AI 智能体的身份与权限挑战：Uber 和 Auth0 如何重新思考访问控制
items.summary_zh: 随着AI智能体在企业中自主执行任务，传统基于用户角色的权限模型不再适用。Uber和Auth0正探索新的访问控制框架，为AI代理分配动态身份、细粒度权限和实时审计能力。这一变革让安全团队能更有效地管理非人类实体的行为风险，是Agent实际落地的关键支撑。
items.summary_en: As AI agents autonomously execute tasks within enterprises, traditional role-based access control falls short. Uber and Auth0 are pioneering new frameworks that assign dynamic identities, granular permissions, and real-time auditing to AI agents. This evolution enables security teams to manage non-human entity risks effectively and is crucial for the practical deployment of autonomous agents.

items.title: Fable 5还未解禁，Anthropic一纸诉状砸向Qwen，自家CEO却被白宫嫌“怪”踢出局！
items.summary_zh: Anthropic在Fable 5模型尚未解禁之际，突然起诉阿里Qwen侵权，引发开源与闭源之争。然而戏剧性的是，其CEO因在白宫闭门会议上发表激进观点被指“过于古怪”而遭排挤。这一事件暴露了AI界竞争的激烈程度，以及政治圈对技术领袖性格的容忍限度。
items.summary_en: Before the release of Fable 5, Anthropic abruptly sued Alibaba's Qwen over alleged infringement, reigniting the open-vs-closed source divide. In a twist, Anthropic's CEO was sidelined from White House meetings for being deemed 'too eccentric.' The episode highlights brutal AI competition and the political establishment's limited tolerance for unconventional tech leaders.

items.title: 云端 AI 治理：架构师实操指南
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章是一份面向架构师的云端AI治理实操指南，深入探讨了如何在云环境中有效管理AI模型、数据安全和合规性。它强调架构师需要从系统设计层面融入治理策略，确保AI应用的可解释性和可控性，同时平衡性能与风险。对于正在构建或优化AI基础设施的团队来说，这份指南提供了从理论到落地的关键思路。
items.summary_en: This article serves as a hands-on guide for architects navigating AI governance in the cloud. It dives into practical strategies for managing AI models, ensuring data security, and maintaining compliance within cloud environments. The piece stresses the importance of embedding governance into system design from the start, focusing on interpretability and control without sacrificing performance. Architects and engineering teams building or refining AI infrastructure will find actionable insights to balance innovation with risk management.

items.title: 两年砸10亿，北森宣布All in AI：上线15个AI HR专家，造了一个“数字人事部”
items.summary_zh: 北森这家HR SaaS公司宣布投入10亿元全面转型AI，推出了15个AI HR专家，打造了一个名为“数字人事部”的智能工作平台。这些AI专家能覆盖招聘、绩效、薪酬等多个HR场景，旨在用自动化大幅提升HR效率。对于希望用AI重构企业人事管理流程的团队来说，这个案例展示了从战略投入到产品落地的完整路径。
items.summary_en: Beisen, a Chinese HR SaaS company, announced a $140 million investment to go all-in on AI, launching 15 AI-powered HR specialists under a virtual 'Digital HR Department.' These AI agents cover recruitment, performance, payroll, and more, aiming to automate and streamline HR operations. This move signals a bold bet on AI transforming enterprise HR, offering a blueprint for organizations looking to replace traditional processes with intelligent agents.

items.title: 轻量级ADR与架构咨询例会如何支撑架构决策工作
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章介绍了轻量级架构决策记录和架构咨询例会相结合的方法，来支撑团队在软件开发中做出更明智的架构决策。通过简化ADR模板和定期举办咨询例会，团队能够高效地记录决策背景、评估选项并推动共识，避免后期返工。对于追求敏捷又希望保持架构可追溯性的技术团队来说，这种轻量级实践非常实用。
items.summary_en: This article explores how lightweight Architecture Decision Records combined with regular architecture advisory meetings can help teams make better architectural decisions. By simplifying ADR templates and holding focused consultation sessions, teams can efficiently document decision contexts, evaluate trade-offs, and build consensus early, reducing rework. It's a practical approach for agile teams that want to maintain architectural traceability without heavy bureaucracy.

items.title: AI 设计9个月就能媲美Blackwell？OpenAI “辣芯”绕开英伟达正面战场，但老黄的GPU大盘不稳了
items.summary_zh: OpenAI正在研发代号为“辣芯”的AI芯片，声称仅需9个月就能达到与英伟达Blackwell相当的算力水平，试图绕开对英伟达GPU的依赖。这一举动直接挑战了英伟达在AI芯片领域的主导地位，可能重塑整个硬件生态。如果成功，它将大幅降低AI模型的训练与推理成本，让更多企业受益于自研芯片带来的红利。
items.summary_en: OpenAI is reportedly developing a custom AI chip codenamed 'Spicy Core' that could rival Nvidia's Blackwell architecture in just nine months of design, aiming to bypass reliance on Nvidia's GPUs. This move directly challenges Nvidia's dominance in AI hardware and could reshape the chip landscape. If successful, it would significantly reduce training and inference costs, democratizing access to high-performance AI for a broader range of companies.

items.title: 从 Copilot 到 Autopilot：微软发布常驻型企业智能体 Scout
items.summary_zh: 微软推出了名为“Scout”的常驻型企业智能体，标志着从Copilot的辅助模式向Autopilot的自主模式升级。这个AI代理能够常驻在企业的各种系统中，主动执行任务、监控流程并做出决策，不再只是等用户提问。对于追求高自动化运营的企业来说，Scout代表了一种新的生产力范式，让AI真正成为团队里的常驻成员。
items.summary_en: Microsoft has launched Scout, a resident enterprise agent that marks a shift from Copilot's assistive mode to Autopilot's autonomous operation. Unlike traditional AI assistants that wait for prompts, Scout resides within enterprise systems, proactively executing tasks, monitoring workflows, and making decisions. For organizations aiming for hyper-automation, Scout represents a new productivity paradigm where AI becomes a permanent team member that acts independently.

items.title: 当 Agent 成为新的核心云用户：阿里云重新定义“用云范式”
items.summary_zh: 阿里云提出“Agent成为新核心云用户”的理念，这标志着云计算的使用范式正在发生根本性转变。过去开发者需要手动配置资源、编写代码来管理云服务，而现在智能Agent可以自动感知业务需求、动态调度资源并执行复杂任务。这种转变让云从“基础设施”进化为“自主服务平台”，企业只需定义目标，Agent就能自主完成部署、运维和优化。对于中小企业和缺乏专业运维团队的项目来说，这将大幅降低云的使用门槛和成本，同时提升系统的智能化与响应速度。
items.summary_en: Alibaba Cloud has introduced a new paradigm where intelligent agents become the primary users of cloud infrastructure, fundamentally shifting how organizations interact with cloud services. Instead of manually configuring resources and writing deployment scripts, businesses can now define high-level goals and let autonomous agents handle resource provisioning, scaling, and optimization in real time. This evolution transforms the cloud from a passive infrastructure into an active, self-service platform. It's particularly valuable for small and medium-sized enterprises and teams without dedicated DevOps staff, as it dramatically reduces operational complexity and costs while improving system responsiveness and efficiency.

items.title: An entire Herculaneum scroll has been read for the first time
items.author: verditelabs
items.summary_zh: 科学家们首次完整地阅读了一卷被维苏威火山喷发碳化的赫库兰尼姆古卷，这卷在公元79年埋藏至今的莎草纸文献通过先进成像技术和人工智能得到了成功解读。团队利用高分辨率扫描和机器学习模型破译了被碳化的文字，揭示了古希腊哲学和文学的新内容。这项突破不仅为历史研究打开了一扇通往古代世界的新窗户，也验证了非侵入式技术对脆弱文物的保护价值。对于考古学家、古典学者以及所有对文明传承感兴趣的人来说，这是一个激动人心的里程碑。
items.summary_en: For the first time, researchers have fully read a Herculaneum scroll that was carbonized by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in 79 AD. Using advanced X-ray imaging and machine learning, they deciphered the charred papyrus, unearthing new passages of ancient Greek philosophy and literature. This achievement solves a centuries-old puzzle—these scrolls were long considered too fragile to unroll. The breakthrough not only enriches our understanding of antiquity but also demonstrates a powerful, non-invasive method for studying other delicate artifacts. Archaeologists, classicists, and anyone fascinated by lost knowledge will find this a monumental leap forward.

items.title: Om Malik has died
items.author: minimaxir
items.summary_zh: 知名科技博主、硅谷早期互联网的深刻观察者 Om Malik 去世，享年 56 岁。他因创办科技博客 GigaOM 而闻名，长期撰写关于宽带、风险投资和初创生态的深度文章。他的笔触既有技术洞察又充满人文关怀，影响了整整一代科技写作者和创业者。他的离世让科技界感到惋惜，许多人怀念他那些冷静而富有远见的分析。在他留下的文字中，我们依然能感受到他对创新和社区的热忱，这份精神将继续激励后来者。
items.summary_en: Om Malik, the renowned tech blogger and a sharp observer of the early internet era, has passed away at 56. He founded GigaOM, a blog that became a must-read for its deep dives into broadband, venture capital, and startup culture. Malik's writing was distinctive—technically astute yet deeply human, often questioning the impact of technology on society. He mentored a generation of writers and entrepreneurs with his calm, insightful analyses. The tech community mourns his loss, remembering his warmth and vision. His legacy lives on through his articles, which continue to inspire thoughtful discourse about innovation and community.

items.title: The 'papers, please' era of the internet will decimate your privacy
items.author: bilsbie
items.summary_zh: 文章警告说，互联网正在进入一个“请出示证件”的时代，用户的隐私将因此遭到严重破坏。随着网站和服务越来越频繁地要求用户提供身份验证、手机号或生物识别信息，每一次“请出示证件”的请求都在侵蚀匿名浏览的可能性。这种趋势不仅让个人数据被大量收集和关联，还可能导致线上行为被监控、自由表达受限。尤其值得关注的是，当身份验证成为访问信息的必要条件时，弱势群体和隐私意识强的用户将首当其冲受到影响。
items.summary_en: The article warns that the internet is entering a 'papers, please' era where users are increasingly forced to present identification to access websites and services, with devastating consequences for privacy. Each request for phone numbers, government IDs, or biometric data chips away at the possibility of anonymous browsing, allowing companies and governments to track, correlate, and monitor online behavior. This trend not only enables mass data collection but also chills free expression, particularly for vulnerable groups and privacy-conscious individuals. The piece argues that mandatory identity verification systems are becoming the new normal, fundamentally changing the open nature of the internet and creating a surveillance infrastructure that will be difficult to dismantle.

items.title: U.S. government will decide who gets to use GPT-5.6
items.author: alain94040
items.summary_zh: 美国政府计划对GPT-5.6的使用实施管控，届时谁有资格使用这一强大的人工智能模型将由官方决定。这一举措源于对先进AI潜在风险的担忧，包括可能被用于制造虚假信息、自动化网络攻击或削弱国家安全。然而，这种做法也引发了关于创新自由和监管边界的激烈争论。支持者认为必要的安全审查可以防止技术滥用，而批评者则担心政府过度干预会扼杀小企业和独立开发者的机会，甚至造成技术垄断。
items.summary_en: The U.S. government is moving to regulate access to GPT-5.6, meaning federal authorities will decide who can use this advanced AI model. This unprecedented control arises from concerns about the model's potential to generate disinformation, automate cyberattacks, or threaten national security. Proponents argue that mandatory licensing and security screenings are essential to prevent misuse by malicious actors. Critics, however, warn that such government oversight could stifle innovation, favor large incumbents, and limit access for startups and independent researchers. The debate highlights a fundamental tension between reaping AI's benefits and containing its risks, with the outcome likely setting a precedent for how future powerful AI systems will be governed.

items.title: Previewing GPT‑5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.author: minimaxir
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol的预览信息已经公布，这是一款被描述为“下一代”的人工智能模型。据透露，它在推理能力、上下文理解和多模态交互方面相比前代有显著提升。该模型能够处理更复杂的任务，比如长文本的深度分析、跨领域的知识整合以及更自然的对话体验。对于开发者和企业来说，这意味着可以构建更智能的应用程序，从自动化客户服务到高级数据分析。不过，目前关于其具体参数和发布时间的细节仍然有限，业界正密切关注其正式发布。
items.summary_en: A preview of GPT-5.6 Sol has been released, showcasing what is described as a next-generation AI model with substantial improvements in reasoning, context comprehension, and multimodal capabilities. The model is designed to handle more complex tasks such as deep analysis of lengthy documents, cross-domain knowledge synthesis, and more natural conversational interactions. For developers and enterprises, this opens up possibilities for building smarter applications ranging from advanced customer service bots to sophisticated data analysis tools. While specific technical details and the official release timeline remain limited, the preview has generated significant interest in the AI community, with many anticipating how this model might push the boundaries of what language models can achieve in real-world scenarios.

items.title: We’re making Bunny DNS free
items.author: dabinat
items.summary_zh: Bunny DNS 宣布完全免费，这是一家提供内容分发网络和域名解析服务的公司。以往需要付费才能享用的专业级 DNS 解析和加速功能，现在个人开发者和小型网站都可以零成本使用。这项举措大幅降低了网络基础设施的门槛，尤其适合那些想要提升网站性能但预算有限的用户。更重要的是，免费套餐并不限制功能，这意味着任何规模的站点都能获得企业级的稳定性和速度，对独立开发者和小团队来说是个实实在在的福音。
items.summary_en: Bunny DNS has announced that its DNS services are now completely free. Previously a paid offering, this move removes the cost barrier for professional-grade DNS resolution and CDN acceleration, making it accessible to individual developers and small websites. The free tier includes full features without limitations, allowing any site to benefit from enterprise-level stability and speed. This is a significant shift for budget-constrained users who need reliable infrastructure, and it challenges the market by showing that premium performance doesn't have to come with a price tag.

items.title: Apple raises prices of MacBooks, iPads
items.author: virgildotcodes
items.summary_zh: 苹果公司近期上调了MacBook和iPad的售价，这波涨价覆盖了多个型号和配置。原因可能与全球芯片短缺、零部件成本上升以及汇率波动有关。对于消费者来说，这意味着购买苹果电脑和平板电脑的门槛变高了，尤其是那些计划升级设备的学生和创意工作者。不过，苹果在提高价格的同时也推出了一些新功能和配置选项，试图让用户觉得物有所值。市场反应不一，有人认为这是苹果在利用品牌溢价继续扩大利润，也有人理解这是行业面临的共性问题。
items.summary_en: Apple has raised prices across its MacBook and iPad lineup, affecting multiple models and configurations. The price hikes are attributed to ongoing global chip shortages, rising component costs, and unfavorable currency exchange rates. For consumers, particularly students and creative professionals, this makes Apple's laptops and tablets more expensive to purchase, potentially delaying upgrade cycles. Apple has simultaneously introduced new features and configuration options to justify the higher prices, but market reaction is mixed. Some analysts view this as Apple exercising its brand power to maintain profit margins, while others see it as a necessary response to industry-wide supply chain pressures. The move may push some users toward competing devices or older models.

items.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
items.author: jamdesk
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发布了首款自研定制芯片，由 Broadcom 负责制造。这一举动标志着 OpenAI 开始减少对 Nvidia 等外部供应商的依赖，转向为自家 AI 模型量身定制硬件。新芯片针对训练和推理两大环节进行了优化，有望在提升性能的同时显著降低成本和能耗。对于整个AI行业来说，这意味着大模型训练的门槛可能进一步下降，更多创新应用将得以实现。OpenAI 的这一战略也加速了科技巨头自研芯片的竞赛。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has revealed its first custom chip, built in collaboration with Broadcom. This move marks a shift away from relying on Nvidia and other suppliers, as OpenAI designs silicon specifically tailored for its AI workloads. The chip is optimized for both training and inference, promising higher performance with lower cost and energy consumption. For the AI industry, this could make large model development more accessible and spur further innovation. It also signals an intensifying race among tech giants to develop proprietary hardware, reducing dependence on third-party vendors and enabling tighter integration between software and hardware.

items.title: Anthropic says Alibaba illicitly extracted Claude AI model capabilities
items.author: htrp
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 公开指控阿里巴巴通过非正当手段获取了其 Claude 大语言模型的关键能力。据称，阿里巴巴利用 API 调用和反向工程技术，系统性地模拟并复制了 Claude 的推理逻辑和对话行为。这一事件引发了关于 AI 模型知识产权保护和商业秘密泄露的广泛讨论。对于整个行业而言，它敲响了警钟：随着模型价值的飙升，如何防止技术被盗用将成为各家公司必须面对的严峻挑战。这也会影响未来 API 访问策略和模型部署方式。
items.summary_en: Anthropic has publicly accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting capabilities from its Claude AI model through systematic API queries and reverse engineering to replicate the model's reasoning and conversational behavior. This raises serious concerns about intellectual property theft in the AI industry. As models become more valuable, the line between legitimate research and corporate espionage blurs. The accusation highlights the urgent need for stronger safeguards—both technical and legal—to protect proprietary AI systems. For developers and companies relying on API access, this case could reshape how model owners design their interfaces and enforce usage policies in the future.

items.title: Show HN: I made Google Trends for Hacker News by indexing 18 years of comments
items.author: ytkimirti
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者将 Hacker News 过去 18 年的评论数据全部索引，打造了一个类似 Google Trends 的趋势分析工具。你只需输入关键词，就能看到这个话题在 HN 社区中的讨论热度随时间如何变化。这对于内容创作者、产品经理和研究人员来说非常有用，可以帮助他们快速感知技术社区的关注点变迁。
items.summary_en: A developer indexed all Hacker News comments from the past 18 years to build a Google Trends-like tool for the community. You simply enter a keyword and instantly see how discussion popularity has shifted over time. This is invaluable for content creators, product managers, and researchers who want to track the ebb and flow of tech community interests.

items.title: 全面封禁 Cursor！又一家大厂出手了
items.description: 最近，有网友爆料称：快手的研发线发布通知，收紧了对第三方编程软件的使用权限。 不少同学发现，只要在自己办公电脑上点开 Cursor，就直接闪退，压根儿用不了。
items.summary_zh: 有网友爆料快手研发线发布通知，收紧第三方编程软件权限，员工电脑上打开Cursor就会闪退。这标志着又一家大型互联网公司正式封禁AI编程工具Cursor，反映出企业对代码安全和数据隐私的担忧。对于依赖Cursor提升效率的开发者来说，这一趋势可能迫使他们在工具选型和企业合规之间做出权衡。
items.summary_en: A tipster revealed that Kuaishou’s R&D department issued a notice tightening permissions on third-party programming software, causing Cursor to crash immediately when opened on work computers. This marks another major tech company officially banning the AI coding tool, reflecting growing concerns about code security and data privacy. For developers who rely on Cursor for efficiency, this trend may force a trade-off between tool preference and corporate compliance.

items.title: Tencent EdgeOne Makers
items.description: Ship AI agents like web apps, in minutes.
items.summary_zh: 腾讯 EdgeOne Makers 是一个低代码平台，让开发者像部署网页应用一样快速发布AI代理。它整合了腾讯边缘计算网络，提供自动缩放、安全防护和API管理功能。对于想缩短AI产品上市时间的中小团队而言，该工具省去了复杂的运维环节，几分钟内就能将原型变为在线服务。
items.summary_en: Tencent EdgeOne Makers is a low-code platform that treats AI agents like web apps, allowing developers to ship them in minutes with built-in edge computing, auto-scaling, and security. By abstracting infrastructure complexity, it empowers small teams to bypass DevOps headaches and focus on agent logic. The result is accelerated deployment cycles for prototypes and production-ready services, particularly valuable for startups and businesses needing rapid iteration on conversational AI or automation tools.

items.title: BrowserAct
items.description: Web browser automation for AI agents
items.summary_zh: BrowserAct 是一款专为 AI 代理打造的浏览器自动化工具。它让 AI 能够像人类一样操作浏览器，完成填写表单、抓取数据等网页任务。这大大简化了 AI 与真实网页交互的复杂度，特别适合需要构建自动化工作流的开发者和企业。
items.summary_en: BrowserAct is a web browser automation tool designed specifically for AI agents. It enables AI to interact with web pages just like a human, handling tasks such as filling forms and scraping data. This dramatically simplifies the complexity of AI-to-web interaction, making it ideal for developers and businesses building automated workflows.

items.title: Propane
items.description: Automatic customer context for product teams and agents
items.summary_zh: Propane 是一款自动收集客户上下文的工具，为产品团队和AI代理提供即时的用户背景信息。它从聊天记录、工单、CRM等多个来源整合数据，在交互时自动推送相关摘要。产品经理和客服代理不再需要手动翻阅历史记录，可以更快理解客户需求，提升响应质量。
items.summary_en: Propane automatically aggregates customer context from various data sources—conversations, support tickets, CRM entries—and surfaces relevant summaries to product teams and AI agents at the moment of interaction. This eliminates the tedious task of manually searching for background information. Product managers gain instant insight into user pain points, while customer support agents resolve issues faster with full context, making it a productivity booster for any team that handles user-facing communication.

items.title: Oxlo.ai
items.description: Scale across AI models without scaling your bill
items.summary_zh: Oxlo.ai 解决了一个实际痛点：企业想调用多个 AI 模型以获取最佳效果，但成本容易失控。Oxlo 允许你在不同模型之间智能路由请求，从而在不增加账单的前提下实现横向扩展。这对于需要频繁切换模型或进行大规模推理的团队来说，无疑是省钱利器。
items.summary_en: Oxlo.ai addresses a real pain point: companies want to use multiple AI models to get the best results, but costs can quickly spiral. Oxlo smartly routes requests across different models, enabling you to scale horizontally without scaling your bill. This is a huge cost-saver for teams that frequently switch models or conduct large-scale inference.

items.title: Zaro
items.description: Build agents & apps on top of your context with one prompt.
items.summary_zh: Zaro 提出了一种极简的构建方式：只需一个提示，就能围绕你自己的上下文构建 AI 代理或应用。无需繁琐的配置或复杂的工作流编排。这对于希望快速验证想法或为特定数据场景定制 AI 工具的非技术用户和开发者来说，门槛极低。
items.summary_en: Zaro offers a radically simple building approach: with just one prompt, you can create AI agents or applications grounded in your own context. No tedious configuration or complex workflow orchestration is needed. This dramatically lowers the barrier for non-technical users and developers who want to quickly prototype ideas or tailor AI tools to their specific data scenarios.

items.title: Agent Arena
items.description: The first public arena for AI agents
items.summary_zh: Agent Arena 是首个面向AI代理的公开竞技场。它像一场擂台赛，允许开发者和用户直接对比不同AI代理在真实任务中的表现。这个平台解决了AI代理缺乏统一评测标准的问题，尤其适合那些想要挑选最高效代理的团队或个人，让他们在部署前就能直观看到代理的能力差距。
items.summary_en: Agent Arena is the first public arena for AI agents, offering a competitive environment where different agents go head-to-head on real tasks. This platform solves the problem of lacking standardized benchmarks for agent evaluation. Developers and businesses can directly compare performance, making it easier to choose the most effective agent for their needs before deployment. It's a game-changer for anyone building or using AI agents.

items.title: Crewdle AI
items.description: Use every business AI tool without every subscription
items.summary_zh: Crewdle AI 提出了一个大胆的想法：用一个订阅费解锁所有主流商业AI工具。它就像一个万能钥匙，让你无需为每个AI服务单独付费。这不仅大幅降低了企业的工具成本，还简化了团队协作中的工具切换麻烦。对于预算有限的中小企业和个人创业者来说，这是一个非常吸引人的方案。
items.summary_en: Crewdle AI offers a single subscription that unlocks access to every major business AI tool. This solves the problem of managing multiple expensive subscriptions. Instead of juggling different accounts and payment plans, users get a unified platform. Small businesses and independent entrepreneurs benefit the most—they can now leverage a full suite of AI tools without breaking the bank.

items.title: Gemini Spark
items.description: Your 24/7 personal AI agent
items.summary_zh: Gemini Spark 是一个全天候在线的个人AI助手，随时待命处理你的各种需求。它不同于需要手动唤醒的传统助手，而是时刻准备着，像一位永远在线的私人助理。对于快节奏的职场人士或数字游民来说，这意味着再也不会错过任何灵感或紧急任务，让AI真正融入日常生活的每一刻。
items.summary_en: Gemini Spark is a 24/7 personal AI agent that stays always on, ready to assist at any moment. Unlike most AI helpers that require manual activation, this one proactively listens and responds. It addresses the pain point of needing immediate help during late nights or urgent situations. Busy professionals and remote workers will find it invaluable for never missing a beat.

items.title: Figma Motion
items.description: Your Figma canvas now has a timeline
items.summary_zh: Figma Motion 在Figma画布上直接引入了时间线功能，让设计师无需离开设计界面就能制作交互动效。过去，原型制作与动画编辑常常需要切换到After Effects等外部工具，现在这一切都整合进了Figma。对于UI/UX设计师而言，这大大简化了从静态设计到动态原型的工作流，协作起来也更高效。
items.summary_en: Figma Motion adds a timeline directly to Figma's canvas, enabling designers to create motion and animation without switching tools. This solves the common friction of moving between design and animation software. Now UI/UX designers can prototype interactions and export them seamlessly. The integration streamlines the design-to-prototype workflow, making collaboration smoother and reducing iteration time.

items.title: Stripe.Directory
items.description: New way for you & agents to search for businesses on Stripe
items.summary_zh: Stripe.Directory 提供了一种全新的方式来搜索在Stripe上的商家信息，既服务于人类用户，也服务于AI代理。它像一个专门针对Stripe生态的搜索引擎，让开发者和商业用户能够轻松找到特定的商户或服务。这不仅方便了手动查询，更为自动化代理（如支付处理机器人）开辟了数据接入的新途径。
items.summary_en: Stripe.Directory introduces a new way to search for businesses operating on Stripe, designed for both humans and AI agents. It acts as a specialized search engine within the Stripe ecosystem, solving the difficulty of finding specific merchants or tools. Developers can integrate it into their apps for agent-based queries, while regular users get a simple directory. It's a practical bridge between payment data and intelligent automation.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: 写给年轻程序员的几点建议-2
items.description: 现在互联网红利已经消失了，深知年轻程序员的不易，下面就浅薄地谈几点建议。中国人口基数比较大，要培养自己的 商业嗅觉。你能卖爆一个商品，就能获得巨大的财富。微信公众号如果能写出 几万 浏览量的文章，就有
items.summary_zh: 作者针对互联网红利消退的现状，向年轻程序员提出培养商业嗅觉和写作能力的建议。他认为在中国庞大的人口基数下，能卖爆一个商品或写出高阅读量的公众号文章就能获得巨大财富。文章强调技术之外的市场认知和内容表达能力同样重要，适合处于职业早期的程序员思考如何拓宽收入来源。
items.summary_en: The author offers advice for young programmers in the post-internet-bonus era, emphasizing the need to develop business acumen and writing skills. Given China's huge population, successfully selling a product or writing a viral WeChat article can bring significant wealth. The article argues that market insight and content communication are as crucial as technical skills, making it relevant for early-career programmers looking to diversify their income streams.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 🚀 2026 年 5 月 GitHub 十大热门项目排行榜 🔥
items.description: 2026年5月GitHub十大热门：从skills到Pixelle-Video，月榜社区火力集中在「把Agent做进工程化工作流」-能省Token、能记住上下文、能编排多Agent、能产出内容。
items.summary_zh: 2026年5月GitHub十大热门项目排行榜出炉，社区火力集中在“把Agent做进工程化工作流”这一主题上。这些项目不仅能够节省Token开销、记住对话上下文，还能编排多个Agent协作并产出高质量内容。对于开发者和技术团队来说，它们意味着更高效的AI工程化落地方案，让大模型从玩具变成真正的生产力工具。
items.summary_en: The top 10 GitHub projects for May 2026 have been released, with the community's energy concentrated on embedding agents into engineering workflows. These projects save token usage, retain conversation context, orchestrate multi-agent collaboration, and produce high-quality content. For developers and engineering teams, they represent a more efficient pathway for integrating AI into production, transforming large language models from novelties into genuine productivity tools.

items.title: 提示词工程已死，Loop Engineering 称王！保姆级教程 + 项目实战
items.description: 通俗易懂的 Loop Engineering 保姆级教程，用 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 三款主流 AI 编程工具实战体验 Loop 的效果，详解方法论框架和踩坑经验
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章提出了一个有趣的观点：提示词工程已经过时，现在是Loop Engineering的时代。作者用Claude Code、Codex和Cursor这三款主流AI编程工具进行了实战演示，手把手教读者如何应用Loop方法论，并分享了自己踩坑后总结出的实用经验。对于想要提升AI编程效率的开发者来说，这是一篇不可多得的实战指南，能帮助大家快速掌握更先进的与AI协作的方式。
items.summary_en: This article boldly declares that traditional prompt engineering is dead and replaced by Loop Engineering. The author offers a comprehensive, beginner-friendly tutorial using three popular AI coding tools—Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor—to demonstrate how to effectively apply the loop methodology in real projects. It also shares valuable lessons learned from common pitfalls. For developers looking to boost their productivity when collaborating with AI, this practical guide provides a fresh perspective and actionable techniques to master a more advanced way of working with coding assistants.

items.title: 面试官坏笑：“你用 AI 编程一年了，怎么保证 Claude Code 写出来的代码是对的？”我：“直接上 Claude Fable 5 啊！”
items.description: 一年 Claude Code 编程经验总结，6 个实战 Case 展示 CLAUDE.md、Skill、Hook、Sub-agent 等核心技巧，附 Fable 5 模型体验。
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇深入分享使用 Claude Code 编程一年经验的实战文章。作者通过 6 个真实案例，详细展示了 CLAUDE.md、Skill、Hook、Sub-agent 等核心技巧，并附带了 Claude Fable 5 模型的体验。文章既幽默又实在，对长期依赖 AI 辅助编程的开发者很有启发。
items.summary_en: This is a hands-on article sharing a year of experience using Claude Code for programming. The author walks through six real-world cases, demonstrating core techniques like CLAUDE.md, Skill, Hook, and Sub-agent, while also sharing impressions of the Claude Fable 5 model. The writing is both humorous and practical, offering valuable insights for developers who rely heavily on AI-assisted coding.

items.title: 他俩只靠写代码，登上了胡润财富榜！
items.description: 靠写代码，真的可以实现财富自由吗？ 相信这是不少程序员同学在工作几年之后，脑海里或许会思索的一个问题。 当我们日复一日地敲击键盘，实现一个又一个的项目需求和难题时，难免会思考：这条代码之路，最终能否通
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了一个许多程序员都曾思考过的问题：靠写代码真的能实现财富自由吗？作者通过讲述两位仅凭编程能力就登上胡润财富榜的真实案例，剖析了他们成功的路径和背后的逻辑，引发读者对技术职业发展前景的深思。文章不是简单的心灵鸡汤，而是基于事实的理性分析，对于在职业道路上感到迷茫的程序员很有启发。
items.summary_en: This article tackles a question that lingers in many programmers' minds: can coding alone lead to financial freedom? By examining two real-life cases where developers made it onto the Hurun Rich List solely through their coding skills, the author analyzes their paths to success and the underlying logic behind it. It's not just motivational talk but a rational exploration of career possibilities in tech, offering thought-provoking insights for developers who feel uncertain about their future trajectory.

items.title: 基础骨架：30 分钟搭好 pnpm workspace，完成双项目 Monorepo 迁入
items.description: 企业级前端工程化必备技能！从0落地 pnpm Monorepo，将 Vue3 项目与商用大屏双项目纳入统一管理，解决多项目维护痛点，配套对应面试考点梳理，学完即可写入简历，适配中后台前端岗位涨薪需求。
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇面向中后台前端工程师的实战教程，详细讲解了如何在30分钟内使用pnpm workspace搭建Monorepo架构，并将一个Vue3项目和一个商用大屏项目纳入统一管理。文章不仅解决了多项目管理中的常见痛点，还梳理了相关的面试重点，读者学完即可将这项企业级技能写入简历，非常适合希望提升工程化能力以实现涨薪的前端开发者。
items.summary_en: This practical tutorial targets mid-to-background frontend engineers who want to upgrade their project management skills. It provides a step-by-step guide on setting up a pnpm workspace-based Monorepo in just 30 minutes, integrating both a Vue3 application and a commercial dashboard project under a single structure. Beyond solving the pain points of managing multiple projects, the article also highlights key interview points related to Monorepo, making it easy for readers to add this enterprise-level skill to their resumes and boost their career prospects.

items.title: 如何看待腾讯市值蒸发万亿，腾讯押宝姚顺雨是最大的失误吗？
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章围绕腾讯市值蒸发万亿的现象，深入讨论了公司押注姚顺雨是否是一个重大失误。姚顺雨作为腾讯混元大模型项目的负责人，其技术路线和战略决策受到了广泛关注。作者分析了腾讯在AI领域的布局以及市场对腾讯股价的反应，探讨了个人决策对企业命运的影响。对于关注科技公司战略和AI赛道的读者来说，这篇文章提供了一个值得思考的视角。
items.summary_en: This article examines the trillion-yuan evaporation of Tencent's market capitalization and questions whether betting on Yao Shunyu, the lead of Tencent's Hunyuan AI model project, was a major mistake. It delves into Tencent's AI strategy, Yao's technical decisions, and how the market reacted to the company's direction. By analyzing the impact of individual leadership choices on corporate outcomes, the piece offers a thought-provoking perspective for readers interested in tech giants' strategic moves and the competitive landscape of large language models.

items.title: 网传字节员工为专心加班需请假在家，称居家办公无人打扰，在字节这是普遍现象吗？你会专门请假来加班吗？
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章报道了一个颇为奇特的现象：字节跳动的一些员工为了能够专心加班，竟然选择请假在家办公，理由是居家环境无人打扰，工作效率更高。文章探讨了这种现象是否在字节内部普遍存在，并引发了关于互联网公司加班文化和工作生活平衡的讨论。作者还提出了一个引人深思的问题：你是否会专门请假来加班？这篇文章对于了解当前互联网行业的工作状态很有参考价值。
items.summary_en: This article reports a peculiar phenomenon at ByteDance: some employees are taking time off from the office just to work overtime at home, claiming that the undisturbed home environment allows them to be more productive. It explores how widespread this practice is within the company and sparks a broader discussion about overtime culture in internet firms and the blurring boundaries between work and personal life. The author poses a provocative question: would you take leave specifically to work extra hours? This piece offers valuable insights into the current state of work intensity in China's tech sector.

items.title: 138.8 万元起，国产华为尊界 S800 Grand Design 典藏大观正式发布，你怎么看？
items.summary_zh: 华为与江淮联合推出的尊界S800 Grand Design典藏大观正式发布，起售价138.8万元，这是国产汽车在超豪华领域的又一次尝试。该车主打极致设计与顶级配置，意图对标国际豪华品牌。其意义在于展现中国汽车工业向上突破的野心，但对于定价和品牌力能否被市场接受，仍存在争议。
items.summary_en: Huawei and JAC have jointly launched the Zunjie S800 Grand Design, a super-luxury sedan starting at 1.388 million yuan. This release marks another bold attempt by Chinese automakers to enter the ultra-luxury segment, challenging established international brands. The car features exquisite design and top-tier specifications, aiming to redefine what Chinese luxury can be. However, questions remain about whether the market will embrace such a high price tag from a relatively new brand. It represents a significant step for China's automotive industry in its quest for premium status.

items.title: 新加坡籍货船在阿曼湾遭袭，美方称伊朗无人机干的，伊方称不走指定航线的船没安全保障，如何看待此事？
items.summary_zh: 一艘新加坡籍货船在阿曼湾遭遇袭击，美方指责是伊朗无人机所为，而伊朗方面则回应称，不按指定航线航行的船只无法获得安全保障。这一事件反映出中东海域地缘政治紧张局势的升级，对于航运安全和国际关系都有潜在影响。各方立场不同，真相有待进一步调查。
items.summary_en: A Singapore-flagged cargo ship was attacked in the Gulf of Oman, with the US blaming an Iranian drone. Iran responded that vessels not following designated routes cannot be guaranteed safety. This incident highlights escalating geopolitical tensions in Middle Eastern waters, with potential implications for maritime security and international relations. As different parties present conflicting narratives, the truth awaits further investigation.

items.title: DeepSeek 宣布所有部门至少扩大一倍，进行大规模招聘，这一举动意味着什么？
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek宣布所有部门将至少扩大一倍，并启动大规模招聘计划。这一举动意味着公司正积极扩张，可能获得了新一轮融资，或者为了应对AI领域的激烈竞争。对于求职者来说，这是一个进入前沿AI公司的机会；对于行业而言，这表明DeepSeek可能在研发、产品化或市场推广上有重大布局。
items.summary_en: DeepSeek announced a massive hiring campaign, aiming to at least double the size of every department. This aggressive expansion signals that the AI company is gearing up for a major push, possibly backed by fresh funding or in response to intensifying competition. For job seekers, it presents a rare opportunity to join a cutting-edge AI firm. For the industry, it suggests DeepSeek is making significant moves in R&D, productization, or market expansion.

items.title: 如何看待兰州大学一篇顶刊论文插图中有豆包水印，同时被质疑图片复用？这有可能涉及学术不端吗？
items.summary_zh: 兰州大学一篇发表在顶级期刊的论文被曝出插图中含有“豆包”水印，同时被质疑存在图片复用问题。这一事件引发了对学术不端的广泛讨论。水印的出现可能是作者使用了未授权的素材或粗心所致，而图片复用则可能涉及数据造假。目前校方和期刊正在调查，若属实，将严重损害学术声誉。
items.summary_en: A paper from Lanzhou University published in a top-tier journal has been found to contain a 'Doubao' watermark in its figures, alongside allegations of image reuse. This has sparked concerns about academic misconduct. The watermark suggests the authors may have used unauthorized materials or been careless, while image reuse could indicate data fabrication. The university and the journal are currently investigating. If confirmed, this would severely damage the reputation of the researchers and the institution.

items.title: 你用什么语言实现 GUI 应用开发？
items.summary_zh: 在GUI应用开发中，语言选择一直是个热门话题。有人喜欢用Python搭配PyQt或Tkinter快速开发，有人偏爱C++ Qt的高性能，也有人选C# WPF或Java Swing。近年来，基于Web的Electron和Flutter也备受关注。不同的语言和框架各有优劣，开发者会根据项目需求、性能要求、跨平台支持等因素做出选择。这篇文章引发了许多程序员的经验分享和讨论。
items.summary_en: Choosing a language for GUI application development is a classic debate among developers. Some prefer Python with PyQt or Tkinter for rapid prototyping, while others opt for C++ Qt for performance, or C# WPF and Java Swing for mature ecosystems. In recent years, web-based frameworks like Electron and Flutter have gained popularity. Each language and framework has its trade-offs in terms of development speed, performance, and cross-platform support. This question sparks lively discussions as programmers share their experiences and preferences.
